meaning: n.佛蒙特州(美国州名,略作vt.,VT)
examples: I next saw him at his house in Vermont.
When the boys graduated from high school, Ann moved to a small town in Vermont.
Cress started the project in his hometown Burlington, Vermont.
Wait a minute, you're thinking what about Vermont, New Hampshire, New Jersey and Connecticut.
Harris missed the friendly relationships he knew growing up in a small Vermont town.
